action_text: Click the "Delete" button in the confirmation dialog
rationale: We have a confirmation dialog open to delete the selected non-task duplicate. Confirming deletion completes the deduplication step.

action_text: Click the "Cancel" button in the confirmation dialog
rationale: If we need to verify selections before deleting, canceling will safely dismiss the dialog without changes.

action_text: Click the "Close (X)" button on the confirmation dialog
rationale: Closing the dialog via the X is another way to return to the list to re-check duplicates before proceeding.

action_text: Toggle the checkbox for row EXP-35319670314 to change its selection
rationale: If the wrong row was selected, deselecting it lets us correct the selection prior to deletion.
Previewing the selected expense line lets us double-check it’s not associated with a task before confirming deletion.
